description: Mock application packet: a South Korean national who lost his resident registration card and is applying for reissuance at his local Eup/Myeon office, picking the card up in person, with no visit-issuance accommodation and no fee-exemption category claimed. All values are fabricated illustrative test data, not a real applicant's information, constructed to exercise the schema's most common branch: reissueReason=lost (previousIdCard document correctly NOT required, per the form's own exception; reissuanceFee correctly required), receiptMethod=visitApplicationAgency (registeredMail address fields correctly not applicable), isVisitIssuanceForSeverelyDisabled=false (visit-reissuance block correctly not applicable), and no fee-exemption category checked (consentToAdministrativeInfoVerification/consentDate correctly not applicable). Attached documents for this scenario: photo (required) and reissuanceFee (KRW 5,000, required for the lost reason).
